apps.title: Applications
apps.subtitle: Register business applications, manage access assignments and app roles

table.empty: No applications yet; register one from the top right

form.createDescription: Register a business application in the platform catalog; the Keycloak client must already exist
form.editDescription: Application code and the Keycloak client cannot be changed after registration
form.codeHint: Lowercase letters, digits and hyphens (2-50 chars); immutable after registration
form.codeInvalid: Code allows only 2-50 lowercase letters, digits and hyphens
form.name: Application name
form.keycloakClientIdHint: Must be an existing client in Keycloak; validated at registration
form.accessClientRolePlaceholder: Optional; auto-generated as code_access when blank
form.accessClientRoleHint: The client role used for the access projection on the identity provider
form.webhookUrlHint: Callback endpoint that receives access and role change events
form.webhookSecretRefHint: The env key name of the deployment (e.g. APP_CRM_WEBHOOK_SECRET); the platform stores the key reference only, never the plaintext secret
form.requiredMissing: Please fill in all required fields

toast.grantProjected: Access granted and synced to the identity provider
toast.grantPending: Access granted; identity provider projection is syncing
toast.revokeRetry: Revoked; identity provider projection is retrying

detail.notFound: Application does not exist or has been removed

basic.name: Application name
basic.clearHint: Filled URL fields cannot be cleared from the UI yet; they can only be overwritten

keycloak.title: Keycloak binding
keycloak.description: The platform ensures the client and access role exist at registration; this page is read-only
keycloak.hint: Granting access projects this client role onto the user; to change the client itself, use the Keycloak console

assignments.revokeConfirmDescription: This removes the user access to this application and the client role on the identity provider. This action cannot be undone.
assignments.grantDescription: Pick a platform user to grant access to this application

roles.name: Name
roles.empty: No roles yet; register roles in the catalog first
roles.createDescription: Register an assignable role; the semantics of the role are defined by the business application
roles.editDescription: Role code cannot be changed after creation
roles.codeInvalid: Code allows only lowercase letters, digits and underscores
roles.requiredMissing: Please fill in all required fields

roleAssignments.assignDescription: Assign an in-app role to a user who already has access
roleAssignments.scopeIdHint: Not needed for the global scope
roleAssignments.revokeConfirmDescription: The business application will receive a role change event via webhook. This action cannot be undone.
roleAssignments.requiredMissing: Please select a role and a user

sync.title: Projection sync status
sync.description: Distribution of projection status across access records (latest {sampled} of {total})
sync.reconcileHint: Failed projections are retried automatically by background jobs; an hourly reconcile job compares identity provider state with platform facts and repairs drift.
sync.empty: No access records yet; projection status will appear here after access is granted
